ul.li: Memory: Single-pass streaming using OptContext stack-allocated buffers.
Complexity: O(N) linear scan for each pass.
Invariant: Stack balance must be validated post-pass.
NOP Stripping: The final serialization phase removes 0x90 markers.
Identify sequences where all inputs are literals.
Detect local slot overwrites without intermediate loads.
STORE loc(0) @ 11 is redundant because STORE loc(0) @ 18 occurs before any LOAD loc(0).
Multiplications by powers of 2 (2^n) → bitwise left shifts (SHL n).
